englishDefinitions: A classroom activity, typically in primary school, where children bring an object from home and present it to the class, explaining what it is and why it is special.
More broadly, any presentation where something is both demonstrated and explained.
persianTranslation: نشان دادن و توضیح دادن (فعالیت کلاسی)
examples: For show and tell, the boy brought his grandfather's old pocket watch to class.
The teacher used show and tell to help children develop their public speaking skills.
At the staff meeting, the manager did an impromptu show and tell of the new product prototype.
